english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
[An Nas – The Mankind 114 : 0]

Say, ‘I seek the protection of the Lord of humans,
[An Nas – The Mankind 114 : 1]

Sovereign of humans,
[An Nas – The Mankind 114 : 2]

God of humans,
[An Nas – The Mankind 114 : 3]

from the evil of the sneaky tempter
[An Nas – The Mankind 114 : 4]

who puts temptations into the breasts of humans,
[An Nas – The Mankind 114 : 5]

from among the jinn and humans.’
[An Nas – The Mankind 114 : 6]
